DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================
CUSTOMERS
==========================================

Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
| firstName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's first name |
| first_name | VARCHAR(50) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] |
| lastName | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Customer's last name |
| last_name | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [appears to be duplicate] |
| email | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Email address |
| emailAddress | VARCHAR(255) | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| phone | VARCHAR(20) | ? | Contact phone number |
| phoneNumber | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |
| CreatedDate | DATETIME | ? | [unclear if different from created_at] |
| account_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing values documentation] |
| status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| customer_type | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] |
| customer_region | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Geographic region |

Notes:
- Naming convention inconsistency discovered during audit
- Some columns may be legacy duplicates
- Check with application team before cleanup

==========================================
ORDERS
==========================================

Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_id | INTEGER | PK | Unique order identifier |
| OrderID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References customer (which table?) |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | FK | [FK reference unclear] |
| order_date | DATE | ? | Date order was created |
| OrderDate | DATETIME | ? | [different precision?] |
| order_status | VARCHAR(25) | ? | See valid values in... [missing reference] |
| orderAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Total order amount |
| total_amount | DECIMAL(12,2) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| shippingAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Shipping cost |
| tax_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Tax amount |
| TaxAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| payment_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing documentation] |
| payment_method | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |
| notes | TEXT | ? | [missing documentation] |
| Notes | TEXT | ? | [duplicate?] |

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)
- [missing other FK definitions]

==========================================
ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?)
==========================================

Primary Key: [undocumented]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | References PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY?) |
| ProductID | INTEGER | FK | [inconsistent naming] |
| quantity | INTEGER | ? | [missing validation rules] |
| unit_price | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Price per unit |
| UnitPrice | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| discount_percent | DECIMAL(5,2) | ? | Discount percentage |
| discount_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Calculated discount |
| line_total | DECIMAL(12,2) | ? | Line item total |
| LineTotal | DECIMAL(12,2) | ? | [duplicate?] |

Notes:
- Table name ambiguity: ORDER_ITEMS vs ORDER_DETAILS
- FK to PRODUCTS or INVENTORY table not verified
- Calculation logic for line_total not documented

==========================================
PRODUCTS (or INVENTORY_ITEMS?)
==========================================

Primary Key: [conflicting documentation]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| product_id | INTEGER | PK | Unique product identifier |
| ProductID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| product_name | VARCHAR(255) | ? | Product name |
| ProductName | VARCHAR(255) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| product_sku | VARCHAR(50) | ? | SKU code |
| sku | VARCHAR(50) | UNIQUE? | [duplicate?] |
| product_category | VARCHAR(100) | ? | Category classification |
| category | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| unit_price | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Standard selling price |
| current_price | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [different from unit_price?] |
| cost_price | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [missing documentation] |
| stock_quantity | INTEGER | ? | [missing documentation] |
| quantity_in_stock | INTEGER | ? | [duplicate?] |
| reorder_level | INTEGER | ? | [missing documentation] |
| is_active | BOOLEAN | ? | [missing documentation] |
| active_flag | CHAR(1) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |
| product_description | TEXT | ? | Product description |

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| payment_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| PaymentID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing documentation] |
| payment_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [missing documentation] |
| payment_method | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing valid values] |
| payment_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing valid values] |
| transaction_id | VARCHAR(100) | UNIQUE? | External transaction reference |
| TransactionID | VARCHAR(100) | ? | [duplicate?] |
| response_code | VARCHAR(50) | ? | Payment gateway response |
| response_message | TEXT | ? | [missing documentation] |
| created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] |

Notes:
- Multiple FK references (order_id, customer_id) - unclear relationship
- payment_method valid values not documented (credit_card, debit, paypal?)
- payment_status workflow not defined

==========================================
MISSING DOCUMENTATION
==========================================

The following constraints are not documented:
- NOT NULL constraints (assumed, not verified)
- CHECK constraints (unknown)
- UNIQUE constraints (partially documented)
- DEFAULT values (not documented)
- TRIGGERs (may exist, not documented)
- INDEX definitions (not documented)

==========================================
KNOWN ISSUES
==========================================

1. Naming convention: Mix of snake_case and camelCase
2. Duplicate columns: Multiple naming conventions for same data
3. FK references: Ambiguous or undocumented
4. Data types: Inconsistent (VARCHAR vs TEXT, TIMESTAMP vs DATETIME)
5. Missing constraints: NOT NULL not specified
6. Documentation: Many descriptions incomplete
7. Table naming: ORDER_ITEMS vs ORDER_PRODUCTS vs ORDER_DETAILS
8. Status values: No enum documentation
9. Relationships: Cardinality not clearly defined
10. Circular definitions: Some concepts reference each other

==========================================
PENDING CLARIFICATION
==========================================

Questions for business team:
- Difference between Customer, Client, Account Holder?
- Order status workflow complete?
- Payment method types?
- Product vs Item vs Merchandise?
- When is Invoice generated vs Payment processed?
- Can one Order have multiple Payments?
- Can one Payment cover multiple Orders?
- Inventory tracking logic?

Last review: Pending (scheduled for Q2 2024)
